signal_title: Extensão das Medidas Protetivas da Lei Maria da Penha para o Estatuto da Criança e do Adolescente
risk_rationale: The draft bill extends protective measures to minors under 14, which may require adjustments in TikTok's minor protection standards, particularly around content and interaction safeguards for this age group.

compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Protective measures for minors under 14 years.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The draft bill suggests enhanced protective measures for minors under 14, which may necessitate stricter controls or additional safeguards for users aged 13.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Account privacy for 13-15 years is private by default with no opt-out allowed.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Protective measures for minors under 14 years.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The bill may require additional privacy or protective measures for users under 14, beyond current privacy settings.

remediations.title: Enhance Protective Measures for Users Under 14
remediations.description: Implement additional privacy and safety features specifically for users under 14, such as stricter content filtering and interaction limitations.
acceptance_criteria: Additional privacy settings are available and enforced for users under 14.
Content filtering is enhanced to prevent exposure to inappropriate content for this age group.
Interaction controls are tightened to limit potential risks.

business_impact: The changes may require moderate adjustments to the platform's minor protection features, potentially impacting user engagement metrics for the affected age group.
recommended_actions: Conduct a detailed impact assessment to understand the specific requirements of the draft bill.
Engage with Brazilian legal experts to ensure compliance with the new protective measures.
Develop and implement additional safety features for users under 14 to align with the draft bill's requirements.
